name: National Grid MA Residential R-1 — Basic Service

provenance.notes: All numbers read from National Grid's filed Jul-2025 MA rate summary (M.D.P.U. No. 1-25-I, eff. 2025-07-01) and Basic Service table (nationalgridus.com/media/pdfs/billing-payments/electric-rates/ma/resitable.pdf). Supply: residential Basic Service fixed-price 14.672 c/kWh (block 2025-02-01..2025-07-31; rises to 15.484 on 2025-08-01). Delivery total 20.257 c/kWh + $10.00/mo customer charge: Net Distribution 8.939, Net Transition (0.036) credit, Net Transmission 5.798, Energy Efficiency 2.879, Renewables 0.050, Net Metering Recovery Surcharge 1.724, Distributed Solar (SMART) 0.729, EV Program 0.174. Encoding: period rate 29.373 c/kWh = supply + net-metering-CREDITABLE delivery (distribution + transmission + transition); riders_usd_per_kwh 5.556 c/kWh = non-creditable riders (EE + renewables + NM surcharge + SMART + EV), so schema net_metering semantics credit exports at exactly the real MA Class I rate (~29.4 c/kWh) while import totals the filed 34.929 c/kWh. Effective range limited to Jul 2025 because delivery changes monthly (Jun was 20.267; May had a one-time SQ credit). Net metering: MA Class I, cap raised to 25 kW AC Feb 2025 (mass.gov/info-details/net-metering-guide — published, not tariff-sheet).
